title: upower bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.90.9-1]
- Update to the upstream version 1.90.9
- Fix unstable OnBattery status

[1.90.8-1]
- Update to the upstream version 1.90.8
- Update to 1.90.8
- README and HACKING were renamed to README.md and HACKING.md
- Support zsh-completion
- Resolve memory leak when connecting/disconnecting and refreshing the
  battery info.

[1.90.6-3]
- test: Fix incorrect test script
full_text:
[1.90.9-1]
- Update to the upstream version 1.90.9
- Fix unstable OnBattery status

[1.90.8-1]
- Update to the upstream version 1.90.8
- Update to 1.90.8
- README and HACKING were renamed to README.md and HACKING.md
- Support zsh-completion
- Resolve memory leak when connecting/disconnecting and refreshing the
  battery info.

[1.90.6-3]
- test: Fix incorrect test script

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20355-0.html
